issues.description: Trigger value 'Trigger' is not valid. Must be one of: OnPlay, OnAttack, OnAttacked, OnKO, OnBlock, Counter, Trigger, Activated, StartOfTurn, EndOfTurn. If 'Trigger' is intended as a generic trigger, the actual trigger type (e.g., OnPlay, Activated) must be specified based on card effect text.

Action type 'FlipLife' requires clarification: FlipLife typically means converting life to hand. Verify this matches the official card text. If the effect is to gain/lose life, use AddLife or RemoveLife instead.
